betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Railgun§f is a §6single block§f weapon system that launches §6high-velocity projectiles§f at distant targets, capable of destroying §6bosses§f, §6enemy structures§f, and §6terrain§f in a single shot. It is the §6endgame weapon§f of the AR progression — useful for both PvE (boss killing) and PvP (base defense) scenarios.

§6Production Path (railgun.json)§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  . t .
  a b c
  d e d
  ```
- Key: `t`=§6Tracking Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:1), `a`=§6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3), `b`=§6libvulpes:structuremachine§f, `c`=§6Item IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:4), `d`=§6fanSteel§f (forge:ore_dict), `e`=§6coilCopper§f (forge:ore_dict)
- Output: 1x §6Railgun§f (advancedrocketry:railgun)
- Power: 50,000 RF/t per shot
- Range: 256 blocks

The railgun has a §6100-block targeting range§f (right-click to set target) and a §6256-block line-of-sight firing range§f. It requires §6railgun slugs§f as ammunition (crafted from §6iron§f, §6steel§f, or §6titanium§f ingots in a §6shaped§f recipe). Each shot consumes 1 slug + 50,000 RF and deals §6200 HP of damage§f to the target.

The railgun is a prerequisite for the §6Asteroid Mining Mission§f (chain) — it is used to break §6asteroid chunks§f from a safe distance. It is also the §6anti-boss§f weapon of choice in the late game, capable of one-shotting most modded bosses.

§cWarning§f: The railgun consumes 50,000 RF per shot — that is more than a §6Big Reactor§f can produce in a single tick. Pair with a §6Fusion Reactor§f (chain) or a §6Draconic Evolution§f energy core. Always carry at least 64 railgun slugs in your inventory.

§eTip§f: The railgun's targeting GUI shows a §6red crosshair§f when the target is in line of sight. For boss fights, set the target to the boss's §6weak point§f (typically the head) for 2× damage. Pair with a §6Force Field Projector§f (chain) for protection during the cooldown.
